mapper.sql:
select ui.college , bi.upload_time , bi.background_image_id , ui.password , bi.user_info_user_info_id_1 , ui.registration_date , ui.major , ui.name , ui.student_id , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 , ui.phone_number
FROM background_image bi left join user_info ui on bi.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id
mapper.select:
select ui.college , bi.upload_time , bi.background_image_id , ui.password , bi.user_info_user_info_id_1 , ui.registration_date , ui.major , ui.name , ui.student_id , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 , ui.phone_number
,image_files.resource_id as image_files_resource_id ,image_files.resource_name as image_files_resource_name ,image_files.resource_path as image_files_resource_path ,image_files.related_table_name as image_files_related_table_name ,image_files.related_table_key as image_files_related_table_key ,image_files.relate_table_column_name as image_files_relate_table_column_name
FROM background_image bi left join
user_info
ui on bi.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id
left join (select resource_id, resource_name, resource_path, related_table_name, related_table_key, relate_table_column_name from static_resources where related_table_name='background_image' and relate_table_column_name='image_files') as image_files on image_files.related_table_key=bi.background_image_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
